# Nmap

```zsh
PORT   STATE SERVICE REASON  VERSION
139/tcp  open  netbios-ssn   Microsoft Windows netbios-ssn
445/tcp  open  microsoft-ds?
```

---

# Enumeration

## 総合列挙

- SMBmapもEnum4linuxも不可
- Nxcでホスト名の検討付け
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM12]
└─$ netexec smb $TargetIP                        
SMB         192.168.222.220 445    HOUSTON01        [*] Windows 10 / Server 2019 Build 17763 x64 (name:HOUSTON01) (domain:SKYLARK.com) (signing:False) (SMBv1:False)       
```

- Nmapで列挙するも、特に脆弱性はなさそう
```sh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM12]
└─$ nmap --script "smb-vuln*" -p 139,445 $TargetIP

Host script results:
|_smb-vuln-ms10-054: false
|_smb-vuln-ms10-061: Could not negotiate a connection:SMB: Failed to receive bytes: ERROR

```
